title: Persona for a Traveling Entrepreneur
scenario: Create a brief persona description for a traveling entrepreneur. The description should include the entrepreneur's age, travel habits, and business goals. Use a professional tone and keep the description under 150 words.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the description meets the word count and tone constraints.
Check if the description includes the required information (age, travel habits, business goals).
Check if the description is clear and easy to understand.
